The Motorcycle Diaries (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,756,372Details
International Box Office $38,209,793
Worldwide Box Office $54,966,165
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$159,819 (1.0% of total gross)
Legs:9.54 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3 opening theaters/272 max. theaters, 12.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,563,624

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 24th, 2004 (Limited) by Focus Features
International Releases: December 10th, 2004 (Wide), released as The Motorcycle Dairies (Australia)
Video Release: February 15th, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language
Running Time: 126 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign Language
Geographical setting: Amazon Rainforest, Peru, South America
Plot point: Biography, Medical Students, Road Trip
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1950s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: FilmFour, South Fork Pictures, Tu Vas Voir
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Peru, Mexico, Germany, France, Cuba, Chile, Argentina
